title: A first systematic study of [OIII] 88$μ$m at $z>8$: two luminous oxygen lines and a powerful ionized outflow in the first 600 million years
comment: 18 pages + appendices; 7 figures in main text; to be submitted to the Open Journal of Astrophysics
summary: We present deep ALMA Band 7 observations of the [OIII] $88μ$m line and underlying dust continuum emission in four UV-bright, gravitationally lensed (magnification $μ= 1.4-3.8$), JWST-selected galaxies at $z = 8.5 - 10.3$, with observed magnitudes $-22.5 \lesssim M_\mathrm{UV} \lesssim -20.5$. [OIII] $88μ$m is confidently detected in UNCOVER-10646 at $z=8.5080 \pm 0.0011$ ($15σ$) and DHZ1 at $z=9.3113 \pm 0.0005$ ($6σ$), with both being intrinsically luminous systems [$L_\mathrm{[OIII]} = (1.1 - 1.6) \times 10^9$ $L_\odot$] that follow the local [OIII]-SFR relation. [OIII] $88μ$m remains undetected in the two $z>10$ targets, including in the $z=10.07$ X-ray AGN UHZ1, where we obtain a deep limit of $L_\mathrm{[OIII]} < 6 \times 10^7$ $L_\odot$. Dust emission is not detected in any individual source nor in a stack ($<3σ$). The high S/N [OIII] $88μ$m detection in UNCOVER-10646 uniquely reveals an additional broad component ($\mathrm{FWHM} = 1366_{-329}^{+473}$ $\mathrm{km/s}$; $Δ\mathrm{BIC}\approx20$) indicative of an ionized outflow. We infer a high outflow rate of $\dot{M}_\mathrm{out} = 128_{-46}^{+80}$ $M_\odot\mathrm{yr}^{-1}$, corresponding to a mass loading factor $η= \dot{M}_\mathrm{out}/\mathrm{SFR} = 2.9_{-1.0}^{+1.8}$ that is broadly consistent with theoretical predictions and JWST-based studies of ionized outflows at high redshift. While high-resolution ALMA follow-up is required to confirm the outflow, this first systematic study at $z>8$ highlights the unique diagnostic power of [OIII] $88μ$m in characterizing galaxies in the early Universe.

AI.tldr: ALMA Band 7观测在4个z=8.5-10.3的JWST选源中探测到[OIII] 88μm发射线，其中两个源有高置信度探测，揭示了早期宇宙星系的性质和可能的电离外流。
AI.motivation: 研究早期宇宙（z>8）星系的性质，特别是通过[OIII] 88μm线探测来表征星系特性，包括恒星形成活动、尘埃含量以及可能的星系外流现象。
AI.method: 使用ALMA Band 7对4个引力透镜放大（μ=1.4-3.8）的JWST选源进行深度观测，探测[OIII] 88μm线和尘埃连续谱发射，并进行光谱分析和外流特征识别。
AI.result: 在UNCOVER-10646（z=8.5080，15σ）和DHZ1（z=9.3113，6σ）中探测到[OIII] 88μm线，两者都遵循本地[OIII]-SFR关系；在z>10的目标中未探测到[OIII]；尘埃发射在所有源中均未探测到；UNCOVER-10646中发现了宽成分（FWHM=1366 km/s），表明存在电离外流。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次在z>8的系统性研究，展示了[OIII] 88μm线在表征早期宇宙星系中的独特诊断能力，为理解高红移星系的外流和反馈机制提供了重要线索。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了四个UV明亮、受引力透镜效应（放大倍数μ=1.4-3.8）、由JWST选出的红移z=8.5-10.3星系的深度ALMA Band 7观测结果，涉及[OIII] 88μm谱线及其下方的尘埃连续谱发射，观测星等范围为-22.5 ≲ M_UV ≲ -20.5。在红移z=8.5080 ± 0.0011的UNCOVER-10646（15σ）和红移z=9.3113 ± 0.0005的DHZ1（6σ）中，[OIII] 88μm被可靠探测到，两者均为内在明亮的系统[L_[OIII] = (1.1 - 1.6) × 10^9 L_⊙]，遵循局域[OIII]-恒星形成率关系。在两个z>10的目标中，包括红移z=10.07的X射线活动星系核UHZ1，[OIII] 88μm未被探测到，我们获得了L_[OIII] < 6 × 10^7 L_⊙的深度上限。在任何单个源或叠加图像中均未探测到尘埃发射（<3σ）。UNCOVER-10646中高信噪比的[OIII] 88μm探测独特地揭示了一个额外的宽成分（FWHM = 1366_{-329}^{+473} km/s；ΔBIC≈20），表明存在电离外流。我们推断出高速外流率Ṁ_out = 128_{-46}^{+80} M_⊙ yr^{-1}，对应的质量负载因子η= Ṁ_out/SFR = 2.9_{-1.0}^{+1.8}，与理论预测及基于JWST的高红移电离外流研究大致一致。虽然需要高分辨率ALMA后续观测来确认该外流，但这项z>8的首次系统性研究突显了[OIII] 88μm在表征早期宇宙星系方面的独特诊断能力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这是首次在z>8的系统性研究，展示了[OIII] 88μm线在表征早期宇宙星系中的独特诊断能力，为理解高红移星系的外流和反馈机制提供了重要线索。

The larger, opaque markers show the apparent brightness, including the effects of gravitational lensing, while the smaller symbols – connected via the dashed lines – correspond to de-lensed values. We moreover show the compilation of \(z>6.5\) galaxies spectroscopically confirmed with the JWST from tang2024 ; tang2025 as well as the \(z>8\) photometric candidates from hainline2024 . Our targets are particularly UV-luminous galaxies at \(z>8\) .

title: AtLAST -- A five fold increase in the number of identified Strongly Lensed Galaxies in the sub-millimetre and its consequences
comment: This white paper was submitted to ESO Expanding Horizons in support of AtLAST
summary: Strong gravitational lensing is a powerful probe of cosmology, dark matter (DM), and high-redshift galaxy evolution, but current samples of strongly lensed galaxies (SLGs) remain far too small to exploit its full potential. $\textit{Herschel}$'s submillimeter (submm) surveys demonstrated that submm selection provides the most efficient and least biased route to identifying high-redshift SLGs, yet produced only a few hundred systems over limited, heterogeneous fields. Achieving the thousands of SLGs required for precision cosmology and detailed studies of distant dusty star-forming galaxies demands a new, wide-area, homogeneous sub-mm survey. A facility like AtLAST, capable of extending $\textit{Herschel}$-like methodologies to much larger areas, is uniquely positioned to deliver the order-of-magnitude increase in SLG numbers needed for transformative progress.

AI.tldr: AtLAST天文台通过大面积均匀亚毫米波巡天，可将强引力透镜星系样本数量提升一个数量级，从而推动宇宙学、暗物质和高红移星系演化研究

AI.result: AtLAST天文台能够将强引力透镜星系的数量提升一个数量级，达到数千个系统，满足精确宇宙学和遥远尘埃恒星形成星系详细研究的需求。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜是宇宙学、暗物质（DM）和高红移星系演化的有力探针，但目前已知的强透镜星系（SLG）样本仍然太小，无法充分发挥其全部潜力。赫歇尔（$\textit{Herschel}$）的亚毫米（submm）巡天表明，亚毫米选择是识别高红移SLG最有效且偏差最小的途径，但仅在有限的、不均匀的场中产生了数百个系统。要实现精密宇宙学以及对遥远尘埃恒星形成星系进行详细研究所需的数千个SLG，需要一项新的、大面积的、均匀的亚毫米巡天。像AtLAST这样的设施，能够将类似赫歇尔的方法扩展到更大的区域，具有独特的优势，可以提供SLG数量数量级的增长，从而实现变革性的进展。

title: From ASTRID to BRAHMA -- The role of overmassive black holes in little red dots in cosmological simulations
summary: We leverage the overmassive black holes ($\rm M_{BH}/M_{\ast} \approx0.1$) present in a realization of the BRAHMA cosmological hydrodynamic simulation suite to investigate their role in the emission of the unique ``little red dot'' (LRD) objects identified by the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST). We find that these black holes can produce LRD-like observables when their emission is modeled with a dense gas cloud shrouding the active galactic nucleus (AGN). Between redshifts 5 and 8, we find the number density of LRDs in this simulation to be $\rm 2.04 \pm 0.32 \times 10^{-4} \space Mpc^{-3}$, which is broadly consistent with current estimates for the total LRD population from JWST. Their emission in the rest-frame visible spectrum is dominated by their AGN, which induces the red color indicative of LRDs via a very strong Balmer break. Additionally, the elevated mass of the black holes reduces the temperature of their accretion discs. This shifts the peak of the AGN emission towards longer wavelengths, and increases their brightness in the rest-frame visible spectrum relative to lower mass black holes accreting at the same rate. These simulated LRDs have very minimal dust attenuation ($\rm A_V = 0.21 \pm 0.12$), limiting the amount of dust re-emission that would occur in the infrared, making them very likely to fall below the observed detection limits from observatories like the Atacama Large Millimeter Array (ALMA). In contrast to the BRAHMA box, the ASTRID simulation produces systematically smaller black holes and predicts LRD number densities that are more than two orders of magnitude lower than current measurements. We therefore conclude that the presence of black holes that are overmassive relative to their host galaxy, and enshrouded in dense gas, is necessary for AGN-dominated LRD models to reproduce both the observed properties and abundances of JWST LRD populations.

AI.tldr: 利用宇宙流体动力学模拟中的超大质量黑洞（M_BH/M_* ≈ 0.1）来解释JWST观测到的"小红点"天体，发现这些被稠密气体云遮蔽的AGN可以产生LRD样观测特征，其数密度与JWST观测一致。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用BRAHMA宇宙学流体动力学模拟套件中一个实现里存在的超大质量黑洞（$\rm M_{BH}/M_{\ast} \approx0.1$），来研究它们在詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）所识别的独特“小红点”（LRD）天体辐射中所起的作用。我们发现，当这些黑洞的辐射被建模为被稠密气体云包裹的活动星系核（AGN）时，它们可以产生类似LRD的可观测信号。在红移5到8之间，我们发现该模拟中LRD的数密度为$\rm 2.04 \pm 0.32 \times 10^{-4} \space Mpc^{-3}$，这与当前JWST对总LRD星族的估计大致一致。它们在静止系可见光谱中的辐射由其AGN主导，这通过一个非常强的巴尔末跳变诱导出指示LRD的红色。此外，黑洞质量的升高降低了其吸积盘的温度。这将AGN辐射的峰值移向更长的波长，并相对于以相同速率吸积的较低质量黑洞，增加了它们在静止系可见光谱中的亮度。这些模拟的LRD具有极小的尘埃消光（$\rm A_V = 0.21 \pm 0.12$），限制了红外波段可能发生的尘埃再辐射，使它们很可能低于阿塔卡马大型毫米波/亚毫米波阵列（ALMA）等天文台的观测探测极限。与BRAHMA盒子相比，ASTRID模拟系统地产生了更小的黑洞，并预测LRD数密度比当前测量值低两个多数量级。因此，我们得出结论：存在相对于其宿主星系质量过大且被稠密气体包裹的黑洞，是AGN主导的LRD模型重现JWST LRD星族的观测性质和丰度的必要条件。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：相对于宿主星系质量过大的黑洞，加上被稠密气体云遮蔽，是AGN主导的LRD模型能够重现JWST观测到的LRD天体性质和丰度的必要条件。

title: Cold Gas Infall onto A Brightest Group Galaxy via A Gas-Rich Minor Merger
summary: Dust and cold gas are not uncommon in nearby early-type galaxies (ETGs), and represent an important aspect of their evolution. However, their origin has been debated for decades. Potential sources include internal processes (e.g., mass loss from evolved stars), external mechanisms (e.g., minor mergers or cooling flows), or a combination of both. Gas-rich minor mergers have long been proposed as an important channel for cold gas fueling in both observations and simulations, but direct evidence of cold gas transportation via gas-rich minor mergers remains elusive, particularly in galaxy groups and clusters where environmental effects are prevalent. In this letter, we present the first unambiguous case of direct cold gas transportation onto a brightest group galaxy (BGG) at $z=0.25$, driven by an ongoing close-separation gas-rich minor merger with a mass ratio of $\sim1:56$. High-resolution JWST imaging reveals a heavily obscured, low-mass satellite that is barely visible at restframe optical wavelengths. Tidal stripping from this satellite deposits gas and dust onto the BGG, forming prominent $\sim$10 kpc dust lanes in situ. Cosmological simulations indicate that such interactions preferentially occur in gas-rich satellites undergoing their first infall in highly eccentric orbits. Our results highlight the pivotal role of gas-rich minor mergers in replenishing cold gas reservoirs and shaping the evolution of central ETGs in galaxy groups.

AI.tldr: 首次在z=0.25的星系群中观测到气体丰富的小质量并合直接将冷气体输送到最亮群星系，形成约10kpc的尘埃带

artifacts.abstract_zh: 尘埃和冷气体在邻近的早期型星系中并不罕见，并且是其演化的重要方面。然而，它们的起源几十年来一直存在争议。可能的来源包括内部过程（例如，演化恒星的物质损失）、外部机制（例如，小质量并合或冷却流），或两者的结合。富含气体的小质量并合长期以来在观测和模拟中都被认为是冷气体燃料的重要渠道，但通过富含气体的小质量并合直接输送冷气体的直接证据仍然难以捉摸，特别是在环境效应显著的星系群和星系团中。在这封信中，我们首次呈现了一个明确的案例，即通过一个正在进行中的、质量比约为$\sim1:56$的近距离富含气体小质量并合，将冷气体直接输送到一个最亮群星系（红移$z=0.25$）。高分辨率JWST成像揭示了一个严重遮蔽的低质量卫星，它在静止系光学波段几乎不可见。来自该卫星的潮汐剥离将气体和尘埃沉积到BGG上，原位形成了显著的$\sim$10千秒差距尘埃带。宇宙学模拟表明，这种相互作用优先发生在首次沿高偏心轨道内落的富含气体卫星中。我们的结果强调了富含气体的小质量并合在补充冷气体储库和塑造星系群中中心早期型星系演化方面的关键作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：富含气体的小质量并合在补充星系群中心早期型星系的冷气体储库和塑造其演化过程中起着关键作用。

title: Investigating the Reionization Epoch through 21\,cm and Line Intensity Mapping Experiments
summary: The epoch of reionization (EoR), marking the Universe's transition from a neutral to ionized state, represents a pivotal phase for understanding the formation of the first stars and galaxies. Intensity mapping of atomic and molecular lines, such as $[\mathrm{CII}]$ and CO J-ladder transitions, across a broad redshift range is a powerful tool for investigating star formation history, metallicity, the distribution of gas and dust, and the physical conditions within galaxies. Additionally, 21\,cm line intensity mapping directly probes the neutral hydrogen content in the intergalactic medium, offering a unique window into the timing and morphology of reionization. In this study, we explore the cross-correlation between the 21\,cm signal and multi-line intensity mapping (LIM) to forecast their detectability for next-generation experiments. Our analysis emphasizes the complementary potential of these techniques to constrain parameters such as the minimum mass of ionizing sources and the ionization fraction $x_e$. Cross-correlations with LIM also enable constraints on physical properties like metal enrichment and the relationship between star formation rates and multi-line luminosities. Using mock observations from Square Kilometre Array (SKA)-low 21\,cm and Fred Young Submillimeter Telescope (FYST)-like LIM experiments, we find that the $[\mathrm{CII}]$--21\,cm cross-correlation can constrain reionization history by measuring $x_e$ across multiple redshift bins with significance levels ranging from 9 to 40$σ$. We extend our analysis to CO transitions, showing that the CO(1-0)--21\,cm cross-correlation provides competitive constraints on reionization parameters. The synergies explored here will enable robust constraints on both reionization and LIM parameters, maximizing the scientific return of current and next-generation intensity mapping experiments.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 再电离纪元（EoR）标志着宇宙从中性态向电离态的转变，是理解首批恒星和星系形成的关键阶段。对原子和分子谱线（如$[\mathrm{CII}]$和CO J-阶梯跃迁）在宽红移范围内的强度测绘，是研究恒星形成历史、金属丰度、气体和尘埃分布以及星系内物理条件的强大工具。此外，21\,cm谱线强度测绘直接探测了星系际介质中的中性氢含量，为了解再电离的时机和形态提供了独特窗口。在本研究中，我们探索了21\,cm信号与多谱线强度测绘（LIM）之间的互相关，以预测其在下一代实验中的可探测性。我们的分析强调了这些技术在约束电离源最小质量和电离分数$x_e$等参数方面的互补潜力。与LIM的互相关还能约束金属富集等物理性质以及恒星形成率与多谱线光度之间的关系。利用来自平方千米阵（SKA）-low 21\,cm和弗雷德·杨亚毫米望远镜（FYST）类LIM实验的模拟观测，我们发现$[\mathrm{CII}]$--21\,cm互相关可以通过在多个红移区间以9到40$σ$的显著性水平测量$x_e$来约束再电离历史。我们将分析扩展到CO跃迁，表明CO(1-0)--21\,cm互相关对再电离参数提供了有竞争力的约束。本文探索的协同效应将能够对再电离和LIM参数进行稳健约束，从而最大化当前和下一代强度测绘实验的科学回报。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，多谱线强度测绘与21厘米信号的交叉关联技术具有互补潜力，能同时约束再电离化历史和星系物理参数，最大化当前和下一代强度测绘实验的科学产出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Schematic workflow for [CII]-21 cm and COs-21 cm cross-correlations analysis. We model [CII]/CO emissions using halo mass-to-SFR and SFR-to-luminosity scaling relations, and 21cm signals via excursion set formalism applied to ionizing photon production. Cross-correlation of the resulting intensity maps enables power spectrum forecasts. Finally, we incorporate instrumental noise, interlopers, foregrounds, and other effects to forecast the detectability of these cross-correlations and determine the constraints on the parameters of interest.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：[CII]-21 cm和COs-21 cm互相关分析的工作流程示意图。我们使用暗晕质量-恒星形成率（SFR）和SFR-光度标度关系对[CII]/CO发射进行建模，并通过基于电离光子产生的游走集合形式对21cm信号进行建模。所得强度图的互相关可实现功率谱预测。最后，我们加入仪器噪声、干扰源、前景等效应，以预测这些互相关的可探测性，并确定对感兴趣参数的约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Evolution of the free-electron fraction for a tanh reionization history. We illustrate the change in the ionization fraction resulting from variations in the central redshift of reionization and the width of reionization using two adjacent colorbars. The reionization history derived from the radiative transfer simulations by kulkarni2019l-reio is overplotted for comparison.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：双曲正切再电离历史中自由电子分数的演化。我们通过两个相邻色条展示了再电离中心红移和再电离宽度变化引起的电离分数变化。来自kulkarni2019l-reio的辐射传输模拟得出的再电离历史也叠加在图中以作比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: A snapshot of the 21 cm brightness temperature fluctuations and [CII] intensity emission at \(z\sim 7.3\) . The black dots on the 21 cm panel represent the distribution of dark matter halos. For visibility purposes, we apply a beam convolution with \(\theta=1\,{arcmin}\) to the [CII] intensity map.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在\(z\sim 7.3\)处21 cm亮温度涨落和[CII]强度发射的快照。21 cm面板上的黑点代表暗物质晕的分布。为便于观察，我们对[CII]强度图应用了\(\theta=1\,{arcmin}\)的波束卷积。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Left: the auto power spectrum of the 21 cm signal at redshifts 7.6, 7.3, 6.6, and 5.8 for ionization fractions of 0.35, 0.42, 0.63, and 0.91, respectively. The 21 cm power spectrum decreases with decreasing redshift as the Universe becomes more ionized, reducing the abundance of neutral hydrogen. Right: the power spectrum of [CII] line emissions at the same redshifts as the 21 cm signal. The power spectrum increases with redshift as more sources produce high-energy photons that ionize the IGM. As we integrate over all sources, the amplitude increases. For the LIM calculation, we use the Schareer20 models to generate the LIM maps.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左图：红移7.6、7.3、6.6和5.8处21 cm信号的自功率谱，对应的电离分数分别为0.35、0.42、0.63和0.91。随着宇宙进一步电离，中性氢丰度减少，21 cm功率谱随红移降低而减小。右图：与21 cm信号相同红移处[CII]谱线发射的功率谱。随着更多源产生电离IGM的高能光子，功率谱随红移增加而增大。由于我们对所有源进行积分，振幅增大。对于LIM计算，我们使用Schareer20模型生成LIM图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: We show the cross-correlated signal between the 21 cm and [CII] line emissions at four different redshifts. The anti-correlation between these two signals reaches its maximum value when the Universe is half ionized and half neutral.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：我们展示了四个不同红移处21 cm与[CII]谱线发射之间的互相关信号。当宇宙处于半电离半中性状态时，这两个信号之间的反相关达到最大值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The foreground contamination of the 21 cm signal coming from the EoR. The solid lines represent the optimistic foreground model, where the dashed lines are the moderate foreground models implemented in 21cmSense package. These models consist of both extragalactic foreground, thermal noise and sample variance. We show the five frequency bands which are necessary for measuring the 21 cm signal for estimating the LIM-21 cm cross-correlations.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：来自EoR的21 cm信号的前景污染。实线代表乐观前景模型，虚线是21cmSense包中实现的中等前景模型。这些模型包括河外前景、热噪声和样本方差。我们展示了测量21 cm信号以估计LIM-21 cm互相关所需的五个频带。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Parameter constraints and their redshift dependencies as inferred from the [CII]-21 cm cross-correlations. We use SKA-low and FYST-like instruments to forecast the parameters at four redshifts. As the ionization fraction \(x_{e}\) increases at lower redshifts, the contours shift to higher values of \(x_{e}\) . This indicates that we can measure the ionization fraction precisely at these redshifts to better understand the morphology of reionization.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：从[CII]-21 cm互相关推断出的参数约束及其红移依赖性。我们使用SKA-low和FYST类仪器在四个红移处预测参数。随着电离分数\(x_{e}\)在较低红移处增加，等高线向更高的\(x_{e}\)值移动。这表明我们可以在这些红移处精确测量电离分数，以更好地理解再电离的形态。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: The parameter constraints are determined from LIM–21 cm cross-correlations, assuming CO(1-0) to CO(4-3) line emissions. We consider the “optimistic” ground-based scenario while using SKA-Low as our experiment, and a COMAP-like experiment for measuring different CO transitions. Our forecasts show that CO(1-0) provides the tightest constraints on the parameters; however, a joint analysis would be useful for breaking degeneracies among the parameters.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：假设CO(1-0)到CO(4-3)谱线发射，从LIM–21 cm互相关确定的参数约束。我们考虑“乐观”的地面场景，使用SKA-Low作为我们的实验，并使用COMAP类实验来测量不同的CO跃迁。我们的预测表明，CO(1-0)对参数提供了最严格的约束；然而，联合分析将有助于打破参数之间的简并。

title: Radio emission in star-forming galaxies: connection to restarted or relic AGN activity
summary: Increasing evidence shows that AGN with radio detections have more perturbed ionized gas kinematics and higher outflow detection rates, suggesting a link between radio emission and these processes. In galaxies with weak or ambiguous AGN signatures, some studies attribute the radio emission to star formation, while others propose AGN-driven winds or weak, unresolved jets as the dominant mechanism. To investigate this connection, we take a step back and analyze a sample of star-forming (SF) galaxies with no clear current AGN signatures. Using low-(LOFAR, 144MHz) and high-frequency (FIRST, 1.4GHz) surveys, combined with spatially resolved spectroscopy from the MaNGA survey, we compare SF galaxies with 144 MHz detections that either do or do not have GHz detections. Despite being matched in stellar mass, redshift, and radio (MHz) luminosity, GHz-detected SF galaxies systematically differ from their non-GHz-detected counterparts. The former display enhanced ionized gas-emission line widths, higher central outflow fractions, redder colors, increased central obscuration, and offset emission-line ratios that shift towards (or closer to) the AGN regime (in the [NII] BPT diagram). Furthermore, the non-GHz galaxies are likely undetected due to their extended radio morphologies, while the GHz-detected ones are significantly more radio compact. Most of the properties from the GHz-detected (compared to non-detected) remarkably resemble the behavior found in many studies of radio-detected AGNs. This suggests that the underlying physical mechanisms shaping GHz-detected SF galaxies properties are fundamentally similar. This raises intriguing questions about whether some compact SF galaxies represent a precursor phase of AGN evolution or a form of low-power AGN. The radio compact characteristic sizes of GHz-detected SF galaxies also suggest a connection between AGN and old starburst galaxies.

AI.tldr: SF星系中GHz射电探测与AGN类似性质相关：GHz探测的SF星系表现出增强的电离气体运动学、更高中心外流比例、更红颜色、增加的中心遮蔽，以及向AGN区域偏移的发射线比，暗示其物理机制与射电探测的AGN相似。
AI.motivation: 研究射电探测与星系电离气体运动学和外流过程之间的联系，特别是在没有明确AGN特征的恒星形成星系中，GHz射电探测是否与AGN类似性质相关。
AI.method: 使用低频（LOFAR, 144MHz）和高频（FIRST, 1.4GHz）射电巡天数据，结合MaNGA巡天的空间分辨光谱，比较具有144MHz探测但没有GHz探测的SF星系与既有144MHz又有GHz探测的SF星系，匹配恒星质量、红移和射电光度。
AI.result: GHz探测的SF星系系统性地表现出：增强的电离气体发射线宽度、更高的中心外流比例、更红颜色、增加的中心遮蔽、向AGN区域偏移的发射线比（[NII] BPT图），以及更紧凑的射电形态。这些性质与射电探测的AGN研究中观察到的行为相似。
AI.conclusion: GHz探测的SF星系与射电探测的AGN具有相似的物理机制，暗示这些紧凑的SF星系可能是AGN演化的前身阶段或低功率AGN的一种形式，其射电紧凑特性也提示AGN与年老星暴星系之间的联系。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 越来越多的证据表明，具有射电探测的活跃星系核（AGN）表现出更受扰动的电离气体运动学和更高的外流探测率，暗示射电辐射与这些过程之间存在联系。在具有微弱或模糊AGN特征的星系中，一些研究将射电辐射归因于恒星形成，而另一些研究则提出AGN驱动的风或微弱的、未分辨的喷流是主导机制。为了探究这种联系，我们退一步分析了一个样本，该样本由没有明确当前AGN特征的恒星形成（SF）星系组成。利用低频（LOFAR，144MHz）和高频（FIRST，1.4GHz）巡天，结合来自MaNGA巡天的空间分辨光谱，我们比较了具有144 MHz探测的SF星系，这些星系要么有GHz探测，要么没有。尽管在恒星质量、红移和射电（MHz）光度上进行了匹配，但具有GHz探测的SF星系与其无GHz探测的对应星系存在系统性差异。前者表现出增强的电离气体发射线宽度、更高的中心外流比例、更红的颜色、增加的中心遮蔽，以及向AGN区域（在[NII] BPT图中）偏移（或更接近）的发射线比。此外，无GHz探测的星系很可能因其延展的射电形态而未被探测到，而具有GHz探测的星系则明显更紧凑。与无探测的星系相比，具有GHz探测的星系的大多数性质与许多射电探测AGN研究中的行为惊人地相似。这表明塑造具有GHz探测的SF星系性质的潜在物理机制在根本上是相似的。这引发了一些有趣的问题：一些紧凑的SF星系是否代表了AGN演化的前身阶段，或者是一种低功率AGN的形式。具有GHz探测的SF星系的射电紧凑特征尺寸也暗示了AGN与年老星暴星系之间的联系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：GHz探测的SF星系与射电探测的AGN具有相似的物理机制，暗示这些紧凑的SF星系可能是AGN演化的前身阶段或低功率AGN的一种形式，其射电紧凑特性也提示AGN与年老星暴星系之间的联系。

title: Surveying Galaxy Clusters (in formation) in the Distant Universe
comment: 4 pages; This white paper was submitted to ESO Expanding Horizons in support of AtLAST
summary: Present-day galaxy clusters are the largest virialized structures in the Universe, yet their early assembly remains poorly understood. At z$>$2, clusters in formation span tens of Mpc and host gas-rich, dust-obscured galaxies embedded in extended, low-surface-brightness gaseous environments. Current (sub-)millimeter facilities lack the mapping speed, sensitivity, and contiguous field of view needed to trace the cold gas and dust driving rapid galaxy growth across such scales. A future large single-dish observatory with degree-scale coverage, broad spectral access, and high-multiplex capability would enable comprehensive and uniform mapping of entire protoclusters, revealing where star formation is triggered or quenched, and quantifying the cold gas budget, thus providing information on gas cooling within protocluster environments. In synergy with wide-sky optical/NIR surveys such as Euclid, LSST, and Roman, this facility would provide the missing multi-scale and multiphase submillimeter view needed to uncover how the stellar, gaseous, and dark-matter components assemble in protoclusters, completing our view of early structure formation.

AI.tldr: 未来大型单口径望远镜将填补对早期星系团形成中冷气体和尘埃观测的空白，揭示原星系团中恒星、气体和暗物质的多尺度多相组装过程

AI.conclusion: 未来大型单口径望远镜与光学/NIR巡天的协同观测将完整揭示早期结构形成中恒星、气体和暗物质组装的完整图景

artifacts.abstract_zh: 现今的星系团是宇宙中最大的维里化结构，然而其早期形成过程仍知之甚少。在红移z>2时，正在形成的星系团跨度达数十兆秒差距，并包含富含气体、被尘埃遮蔽的星系，这些星系嵌入在延展的低表面亮度气体环境中。当前的（亚）毫米波设施缺乏所需的巡天速度、灵敏度和连续视场，无法追踪驱动星系快速增长的冷气体和尘埃在如此尺度上的分布。未来具有度级覆盖、宽光谱接入和高多路复用能力的大型单口径天文台，将能够对整个原星系团进行全面且均匀的测绘，揭示恒星形成被触发或淬灭的位置，并量化冷气体预算，从而提供原星系团环境中气体冷却的信息。与欧几里得、LSST和罗曼等广天区光学/近红外巡天协同，该设施将提供缺失的多尺度和多相亚毫米波视角，以揭示恒星、气体和暗物质成分在原星系团中如何组装，从而完善我们对早期结构形成的认识。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：未来大型单口径望远镜与光学/NIR巡天的协同观测将完整揭示早期结构形成中恒星、气体和暗物质组装的完整图景。

title: AtLAST -- Determination of Halo Mass Density Profiles at kpc Scales through Magnification Bias
comment: This white paper was submitted to ESO Expanding Horizons in support of AtLAST
summary: Magnification bias, the lensing-induced modification of background source number counts, provides a uniquely powerful probe of the mass density profiles of galaxies and clusters down to kpc scales. Unlike shear-based weak lensing, magnification bias does not rely on galaxy shapes and thus avoids dominant small-scale systematics. Existing studies, however, are limited by sky coverage, positional uncertainty, and insufficiently deep, confusion-limited submillimetre (submm) surveys. A next-generation wide-field, high-throughput submm facility like the proposed 50m-telescope AtLAST is required to unlock this technique's full diagnostic power.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用放大偏置效应（magnification bias）作为探测星系和星系团质量分布的有力工具，指出下一代亚毫米波望远镜（如AtLAST）将能充分发挥该技术的潜力。
AI.motivation: 放大偏置效应能够独特地探测星系和星系团的质量密度分布，且相比基于剪切效应的弱引力透镜技术，它不依赖星系形状，避免了主要的小尺度系统误差。然而现有研究受限于天区覆盖范围、位置不确定性以及深度不足的亚毫米波巡天。
AI.method: 利用放大偏置效应——引力透镜引起的背景源数量统计变化，作为探测质量分布的工具。该方法不依赖星系形状测量，而是通过统计背景源的数量变化来推断前景天体的质量分布。
AI.result: 现有研究受到限制，需要下一代宽视场、高通量的亚毫米波设施（如提议的50米望远镜AtLAST）来充分发挥该技术的诊断能力。
AI.conclusion: 放大偏置效应是探测星系和星系团质量分布的有力工具，但需要下一代亚毫米波望远镜设备来克服当前限制，实现该技术的全部潜力。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 放大偏置效应，即透镜引起的背景源数量计数的修正，为探测星系和星系团在千秒差距尺度上的质量密度分布提供了独特而强大的探针。与基于剪切的弱透镜不同，放大偏置不依赖于星系的形状，从而避免了主导性的小尺度系统误差。然而，现有研究受到天区覆盖范围、位置不确定性以及深度不足、受混淆限制的亚毫米波巡天的限制。需要像拟议中的50米望远镜AtLAST这样的下一代宽视场、高通量亚毫米波设施，才能释放该技术的全部诊断潜力。

title: Cluster properties as a function of dynamical state in the DESI Legacy x UNIONS surveys
comment: 27 pages (including Appendices), 26 figures, Submitted to ApJ
summary: We investigate how the dynamical state of galaxy clusters influences their galaxy populations and mass distributions. Using photometrically selected clusters from the DESI Legacy Imaging Survey cross-matched with the UNIONS galaxy shear catalogue, we classify clusters as evolved or evolving based on their rest-frame r-band magnitude gaps and stellar mass ratios between the brightest cluster galaxies (BCGs) and bright satellites. We measure the stellar mass functions, weak-lensing profiles, and radial number density and red-fraction profiles of stacked clusters in both subsamples. Evolved clusters exhibit more concentrated lensing profiles, bimodal stellar mass functions dominated by massive BCGs, and a deficit of intermediate-mass satellites, while evolving clusters show flatter central lensing signals and an excess of massive satellites. Applying the same selection to IllustrisTNG clusters reproduces these trends and links the observed differences to distinct mass accretion histories. These results demonstrate the close link between cluster galaxy populations and the overall dynamical state of their underlying dark matter halo.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们研究了星系团的动力学状态如何影响其星系种群和质量分布。利用DESI Legacy成像巡天与UNIONS星系剪切目录交叉匹配得到的光度选星系团样本，我们根据最亮星系团星系（BCGs）与明亮卫星星系之间的静止帧r波段星等差以及恒星质量比，将星系团分类为演化完全（evolved）或演化中（evolving）。我们测量了这两个子样本中叠加星系团的恒星质量函数、弱引力透镜轮廓、径向数密度和红星系比例轮廓。演化完全的星系团表现出更集中的透镜轮廓、由大质量BCGs主导的双峰恒星质量函数以及中等质量卫星星系的缺失，而演化中的星系团则显示出更平坦的中心透镜信号和过量的大质量卫星星系。将相同的选择标准应用于IllustrisTNG模拟的星系团，重现了这些趋势，并将观测到的差异与不同的质量吸积历史联系起来。这些结果证明了星系团星系种群与其底层暗物质晕的整体动力学状态之间存在密切联系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：星系团的星系种群与其底层暗物质晕的整体动力学状态之间存在密切联系，星系团的演化程度显著影响其内部结构和星系分布特征。

title: Connecting galaxies with their haloes -- from parsec to Mpc scales
comment: 4 pages, similar version was submitted to ESO's call for white papers (Expanding Horizons)
summary: Galaxy evolution is driven by processes occurring across a wide range of scales, from star formation within giant molecular clouds (parsec scales) to outflows and secular evolution across entire galaxies (kpc scales), and the interplay between galaxies, their dark matter haloes, and large-scale structures (Mpc scales). Connecting the distribution of baryonic matter and energy across these scales will remain one of the key challenges for both theoretical and observational astrophysics in the coming decade. A major development towards meeting this challenge has been the growing ability to obtain highly spatially resolved (parsec-scale) integral-field spectroscopic observations (e.g. with VLT/MUSE), as well as to probe the extremely low-surface brightness outskirts of galaxies at large radii and high vertical scale heights. To combine the two regimes, we need a paradigm shift in the way we do spectroscopy on galaxies, especially considering the ongoing and future photometric surveys. The next decade will also bring a revolution in extensive photometric surveys of large areas of the sky, uncovering low surface brightness features around nearby galaxies. However, to fully understand the processes that connect galaxies to their haloes, shape low surface brightness features, and drive secular evolution, spatially resolved spectroscopy will be essential. Here, we outline the need for wide-field spectroscopic observations of statistically significant samples of nearby galaxies and highlight the key questions that can only be addressed with such data

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系演化由跨越广泛尺度的过程驱动，从巨分子云内的恒星形成（秒差距尺度）到整个星系中的外流和长期演化（千秒差距尺度），以及星系、其暗物质晕和大尺度结构（兆秒差距尺度）之间的相互作用。连接这些尺度上重子物质和能量的分布，在未来十年仍将是理论和观测天体物理学面临的关键挑战之一。应对这一挑战的一个重大进展是，获取高空间分辨率（秒差距尺度）积分场光谱观测（例如使用VLT/MUSE）的能力不断增强，以及探测星系在较大半径和高垂直标高处的极低表面亮度外围区域的能力。为了结合这两个领域，我们需要在星系光谱学方法上实现范式转变，特别是考虑到正在进行的和未来的测光巡天。未来十年还将带来大面积天空的广泛测光巡天革命，揭示邻近星系周围的低表面亮度特征。然而，要完全理解将星系与其晕连接起来、塑造低表面亮度特征并驱动长期演化的过程，空间分辨光谱学将至关重要。在此，我们概述了对邻近星系进行具有统计显著样本的宽视场光谱观测的需求，并强调了只有通过此类数据才能解决的关键问题。

title: A sub-ppm upper limit on the cosmological variations of the fine structure constant alpha
summary: Absorption spectroscopy toward high-redshift quasars provides strong constraints on the putative variation of fundamental constants of physics on cosmological time scales. The submillimeter ground-state transitions of methylidyne (CH) and water (H2O), both molecules widespread and coeval in the interstellar medium, provide a sensitive test for variations of alpha, the fine structure constant, and mu, the proton-to-electron mass ratio, taking advantage of the unmatched spectral resolution and frequency reliability of radio techniques. We used ALMA simultaneous observations of the two species to constrain any velocity offset between their absorption profiles toward the radio-bright lensed quasars PKS1830-211 (z_abs=0.88582) and B0218+357 (z_abs=0.68466). Our observational setup minimizes instrumental errors and known sources of systematics, such as time variability of the absorption profile and frequency-dependent morphology of the background quasar. The excellent correlation between CH and H2O opacities, the large number of individual narrow velocity components, and the number of independent spectra obtained due to the intrinsic time variability of the absorption profiles ensure that even the chemical segregation bias is minimized. We obtained bulk velocity shifts delta_v = -0.048 pm 0.028 km/s and -0.13 pm 0.14 km/s (1 sigma confidence level) between CH and H2O in the direction of PKS1830-211(NE) and B0218+357(SW), respectively. These values convert into the 3sigma upper limits |Delta_alpha/alpha| < 0.55 ppm and 1.5 ppm, respectively, taking into account the independent upper limits on |Delta_mu/mu| previously obtained for these systems. These constraints on |Delta_alpha/alpha|, at look-back times of about half the present age of the Universe, are two to four times deeper than previous constraints on any other single high-z system.

AI.tldr: 利用ALMA观测高红移类星体PKS1830-211和B0218+357的CH和H2O吸收谱，通过测量两种分子吸收谱的速度偏移，对宇宙学时间尺度上精细结构常数α的变化设定了迄今最严格的约束。
AI.motivation: 通过观测高红移类星体的分子吸收谱来检验宇宙学时间尺度上基本物理常数（特别是精细结构常数α和质子-电子质量比μ）是否发生变化，这对理解基础物理学和宇宙演化具有重要意义。
AI.method: 使用ALMA同时观测两个透镜类星体PKS1830-211(z_abs=0.88582)和B0218+357(z_abs=0.68466)的CH和H2O亚毫米波基态跃迁吸收谱。通过测量两种分子吸收谱之间的速度偏移，并利用已知的Δμ/μ上限约束，推导Δα/α的变化上限。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 对高红移类星体的吸收光谱学为物理学基本常数在宇宙时间尺度上的可能变化提供了强有力的约束。亚毫米波段的甲基炔（CH）和水（H2O）基态跃迁，这两种分子在星际介质中广泛存在且同时期形成，利用射电技术无与伦比的光谱分辨率和频率可靠性，为精细结构常数α和质子电子质量比μ的变化提供了灵敏的检验。我们利用ALMA对这两种物种的同时观测，限制了它们朝向射电明亮透镜类星体PKS1830-211（z_abs=0.88582）和B0218+357（z_abs=0.68466）的吸收轮廓之间的任何速度偏移。我们的观测设置最小化了仪器误差和已知的系统误差来源，例如吸收轮廓的时间变化和背景类星体的频率相关形态。CH和H2O不透明度之间的极好相关性、大量独立的窄速度分量以及由于吸收轮廓固有的时间变化性而获得的独立光谱数量，确保了即使是化学分离偏差也被最小化。我们获得了在PKS1830-211(NE)和B0218+357(SW)方向上CH和H2O之间的整体速度偏移δ_v = -0.048 ± 0.028 km/s 和 -0.13 ± 0.14 km/s（1σ置信水平）。考虑到先前对这些系统获得的|Δμ/μ|的独立上限，这些值分别转换为3σ上限|Δα/α| < 0.55 ppm 和 1.5 ppm。这些对|Δα/α|的约束，在回溯时间约为当前宇宙年龄一半时，比之前对任何其他单个高红移系统的约束深两到四倍。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该研究通过对CH和H2O吸收谱的高精度测量，在宇宙年龄约一半的回望时间尺度上，对精细结构常数α的稳定性设定了迄今最严格的约束，支持α在宇宙演化过程中保持恒定。

title: A high-dynamic-range view of the growth of structure and the warm/hot Universe
comment: This white paper was submitted to ESO Expanding Horizons in support of AtLAST
summary: Baryons heat to temperatures above $>\!\!10^5\,\mathrm{K}$ as they accrete onto massive overdensities -- galaxies, groups, clusters, and filaments -- where they ionize and become optically transparent. Deep mm-wave observations such as those with ALMA have begun to probe a handful ($\sim\,$4) of massive systems at $z\!\sim\!2-4$, while low-resolution mm-wave surveys have detected thousands of objects at arcminute resolution out to $z\!\approx\!2$. To truly advance the field of the evolution of large-scale structures, mapping the warm/hot distribution of ionized gas out to the redshift of their formation, the ESO community requires a large-aperture single-dish (sub-)mm telescope. This will need to provide several orders of magnitude higher mapping speeds than currently available while preserving the few arcsecond resolution required for imaging the gas and removing contaminating radio and dusty thermal signals across the full (sub-)mm wavelength range.

title: Catalogs of optically-selected clusters and photometric luminous red galaxies from the Hyper Suprime-Cam Subaru Strategic Program final year dataset
comment: 13 pages, 11 figures, 2 tables, accepted for publication in PASJ, catalogs are available at https://github.com/oguri/cluster_catalogs
summary: We construct samples of optically-selected clusters and photometric luminous red galaxies (LRGs) from the Hyper Suprime-Cam Subaru Strategic Program final year dataset covering $\sim 1200$~deg$^2$. The cluster catalogs extend out to the redshift of $1.38$ and contain more than 10000 clusters with richness larger than $15$, where the richness is defined to be a membership probability weighted number of galaxies above the stellar masses of approximately $10^{10.2}M_\odot$. The total number of probable red cluster member galaxies in these clusters are more than $6\times 10^5$. Photometric redshifts of the clusters are shown to be precise with the scatter better than $\sim 0.01$ for a wide redshift range. We detect stacked weak lensing signals of clusters out to the redshift of $1$, and use them to update constraints on the mass-richness relation. Our catalog of about 6 million photometric LRGs extend out to the redshift of $1.25$, and have the scatter of the photometric redshift better than $\sim 0.02$ for the redshift range between $0.4$ and $1.0$.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们从Hyper Suprime-Cam Subaru战略计划最终年数据中构建了光学选择的星系团和测光亮红星系（LRGs）样本，覆盖约1200平方度。星系团星表延伸至红移1.38，包含超过10000个富度大于15的星系团，其中富度定义为恒星质量约10^{10.2}M_⊙以上的星系成员概率加权数量。这些星系团中可能的红色成员星系总数超过6×10^5。星系团的测光红移精度较高，在广泛红移范围内弥散优于约0.01。我们探测到红移1以内星系团的堆叠弱引力透镜信号，并利用这些信号更新了质量-富度关系的约束。我们的测光LRG星表包含约600万个星系，延伸至红移1.25，在红移0.4至1.0范围内测光红移弥散优于约0.02。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，成功构建了大规模、高精度的星系团和红星系样本，为宇宙学研究和星系形成演化提供了重要数据基础，并更新了星系团质量-富度关系约束。

title: Bowshocks driven by the pole-on molecular jet of outbursting protostar SVS 13
comment: 61 pages, 19 Figures, 2 Tables. Published in Nature Astronomy: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41550-025-02716-2
summary: Outflows play a key role in the star and planet formation processes. Some outflows show discrete clumps of cold molecular gas moving at extremely high velocities (EHVs) of $\sim$100 km s$^{-1}$, known as ''molecular bullets'', that are likely closely associated with their primary driving agent. Here we present ALMA CO(J=3-2) observations of a bright EHV molecular bullet that reveal its morphology in detail down to scales of 30 au and its kinematic structure across the entire intermediate velocity range ($\sim$30-100 km s$^{-1}$). These provide important new insights into how outflows transfer mass and momentum to the surrounding medium. The observed channel maps display several sequences of ring-like features whose velocity increases and size decreases with projected distance from the driving source, each sequence tracing a thin, bow-shaped shell culminating on-axis in a bright EHV head. The shape, kinematics, and mass of each shell all agree remarkably well with the simplest textbook models of momentum-conserving bowshocks produced by a time-variable EHV jet. The dynamical timescale between consecutive shells is of a few decades, with the latest ejection event coinciding with the protostar optical/IR outburst observed in $\sim$1990. The very strong evidence for bowshock-driven entrainment induced by jet variability revealed by this work suggests that accretion bursts, and therefore variations in the disk snowlines, should occur on decade timescales, which could substantially impact grain growth and planet formation.

AI.tldr: ALMA观测揭示高速分子子弹的精细结构和运动学特征，显示其为时间可变射流产生的动量守恒弓形激波，爆发间隔约数十年，与恒星爆发活动相关。
AI.motivation: 研究高速分子子弹（EHV分子子弹）的形态和运动学特征，以理解外流如何向周围介质传输质量和动量，以及这些过程对恒星和行星形成的影响。
AI.method: 使用ALMA望远镜进行CO(J=3-2)观测，分辨率达到30天文单位，分析高速分子子弹的形态和运动学结构（速度范围约30-100 km/s）。
AI.result: 观测显示多个环状特征序列，其速度随距离增加而增加、尺寸减小，每个序列追踪一个薄的弓形激波壳层，最终在轴上形成明亮的高速分子子弹头部。这些壳层的形状、运动学和质量都与时间可变高速射流产生的最简单动量守恒弓形激波模型高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 观测为射流变异性驱动的弓形激波夹带提供了强有力证据，表明吸积爆发（以及盘雪线变化）发生在数十年时间尺度上，这可能显著影响颗粒生长和行星形成过程。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 外流在恒星和行星形成过程中起着关键作用。一些外流显示出以极高速度（EHV，约100 km/s）运动的冷分子气体离散团块，被称为“分子子弹”，它们很可能与其主要驱动机制密切相关。本文展示了ALMA对CO(J=3-2)谱线的一个明亮EHV分子子弹的观测，揭示了其在30 au尺度上的详细形态以及在整个中等速度范围（约30-100 km/s）内的运动学结构。这些观测为外流如何将质量和动量传递给周围介质提供了重要的新见解。观测到的通道图显示了多个环状特征序列，其速度随投影距离增加而增加，尺寸减小，每个序列描绘出一个薄的弓形壳层，并在轴上终止于一个明亮的EHV头部。每个壳层的形状、运动学和质量都与最简单的教科书模型——由时变EHV喷流产生的动量守恒弓形激波——惊人地吻合。连续壳层之间的动力学时标为几十年，最近的一次喷射事件与约1990年观测到的原恒星光学/红外爆发相吻合。这项工作揭示的由喷流变异性驱动的弓形激波夹带的强有力证据表明，吸积爆发（以及盘雪线变化）发生在数十年时间尺度上，这可能显著影响颗粒生长和行星形成过程。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：观测为射流变异性驱动的弓形激波夹带提供了强有力证据，表明吸积爆发（以及盘雪线变化）发生在数十年时间尺度上，这可能显著影响颗粒生长和行星形成过程。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: ALMA images and position-velocity diagrams of the blueshifted Bullet 1. Primary beam corrected ALMA images of the velocity-integrated intensity, peak intensity of the spectral cube, mean velocity, and position-velocity diagrams of the observed CO( \(J\) =3-2) emission. The higher (lower) angular resolution results are shown in the top (bottom) panels. Synthesized beams are shown at the bottom left corners of the images. Plus signs indicate the positions of the protostars, VLA 4A (west) and VLA 4B (east), of the SVS 13 binary [ 56 , 57 , 58 ] . The H 2 arcuate features [ 60 ] are plotted as black and white arcs, taking into account their observed proper motion and the \(\sim 0.07^{\prime\prime}\) offset between the radio and optical/infrared positions of the star [ 58 , 55 ] . All velocities are relative to VLA 4B, ranging from \(-\) 9.3 to \(-\) 102.7 (top panels) and \(-\) 126.4 km s -1 (bottom panels). These ranges exclude the CO disk emission but not contamination (stronger toward VLA 4A) from disk emission of other molecular transitions, with higher rest frequencies, falling within the frequency range of the blueshifted CO emission of the bullet. Note also that the low-resolution images include emission from the CO clumps 1 and 2 (see Extended Data Fig. 1 and Supplementary Table 1), near the southeast corner. The position-velocity diagrams have been obtained along the longitudinal axis of the bullet (PA = 160 ∘ , indicated by the black line in the panels of the third column), with origin in VLA 4B. Dashed lines in these diagrams indicate the emission of the families of rings II, III, and VI (defined in Fig. 3 ). Contours are: 3, 6, 10, 16, and 25 times \(0.05\) (top) and \(0.61\) (bottom) Jy beam -1 km s -1 (first and third columns); 3, 6, 10, and 16 times \(0.011\) (top) and \(0.066\) (bottom) Jy beam -1 (second column); 5, 10, 20, 35, 60 and 90 times 0.0025 (top) and 0.008 (bottom) Jy beam -1 (fourth column). See Methods for further details.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：蓝移子弹1的ALMA图像和位置-速度图。主波束校正的ALMA图像显示速度积分强度、谱立方体的峰值强度、平均速度，以及观测到的CO(\(J\)=3-2)发射的位置-速度图。较高（较低）角分辨率的结果显示在顶部（底部）面板中。合成波束显示在图像左下角。加号表示SVS 13双星[56, 57, 58]的原恒星VLA 4A（西）和VLA 4B（东）的位置。H\(_2\)弧形特征[60]被绘制为黑色和白色弧线，考虑了它们观测到的自行以及恒星射电与光学/红外位置之间约\(0.07^{\prime\prime}\)的偏移[58, 55]。所有速度均相对于VLA 4B，范围从\(-\)9.3到\(-\)102.7（顶部面板）和\(-\)126.4 km s\(^{-1}\)（底部面板）。这些范围排除了CO盘发射，但未排除来自其他分子跃迁（具有更高静止频率）的盘发射的污染（在VLA 4A方向更强），这些发射落在子弹蓝移CO发射的频率范围内。另请注意，低分辨率图像包括来自东南角附近的CO团块1和2的发射（参见扩展数据图1和补充表1）。位置-速度图是沿子弹纵轴（PA = 160°，由第三列面板中的黑线指示）获得的，原点在VLA 4B。这些图中的虚线表示环族II、III和VI（定义见图3）的发射。等高线为：3、6、10、16和25倍\(0.05\)（顶部）和\(0.61\)（底部）Jy beam\(^{-1}\) km s\(^{-1}\)（第一和第三列）；3、6、10和16倍\(0.011\)（顶部）和\(0.066\)（底部）Jy beam\(^{-1}\)（第二列）；5、10、20、35、60和90倍0.0025（顶部）和0.008（底部）Jy beam\(^{-1}\)（第四列）。详见方法部分。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Observed CO( \(J\) =3-2) spectral channel images at high angular resolution. A sample of high angular resolution channel maps of the CO( \(J\) =3-2) emission observed by ALMA, which illustrate the ringed kinematic structure in Bullet 1. The synthesized beam is \(0.173^{\prime\prime}\times 0.091^{\prime\prime}\) (PA = \(-2.2^{\circ}\) ), and is plotted as an ellipse in the bottom left corner of the first image. The full set of observed channel maps is shown in Supplementary Fig. 1 and Supplementary Video 1. The positions of the two protostars of the SVS 13 binary are indicated by plus signs. Note that several velocity channels are contaminated by emission from different molecular transitions, with higher rest frequency than CO, coming from the disks associated with VLA 4A and VLA 4B [ 58 ] . This disk emission is stronger toward VLA 4A. The LOS velocity relative to VLA 4B is shown in the top left corner of each image. The velocity width of each of the channels shown in the figure is 0.53 km s -1 , which corresponds to five native channels. The r.m.s noise of the images is 2.6 mJy beam -1 . The images have not been corrected by the primary beam response. The H 2 arcuate features [ 60 ] are plotted in the first column as white arcs. Lower angular resolution channel maps, covering a wider range of velocities, are shown in Extended Data Fig. 3, Supplementary Fig. 2 and Supplementary Video 2.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：高角分辨率下观测到的CO(\(J\)=3-2)谱通道图像。ALMA观测到的CO(\(J\)=3-2)发射的高角分辨率通道图样本，展示了子弹1中的环状运动学结构。合成波束为\(0.173^{\prime\prime}\times 0.091^{\prime\prime}\)（PA = \(-2.2^{\circ}\)），并在第一张图像左下角绘制为椭圆。观测到的完整通道图集见补充图1和补充视频1。SVS 13双星的两颗原恒星位置由加号表示。请注意，几个速度通道受到来自不同分子跃迁（静止频率高于CO）发射的污染，这些发射来自与VLA 4A和VLA 4B相关的盘[58]。这种盘发射在VLA 4A方向更强。相对于VLA 4B的视向速度显示在每张图像的左上角。图中显示的每个通道的速度宽度为0.53 km s\(^{-1}\)，对应于五个原生通道。图像的均方根噪声为2.6 mJy beam\(^{-1}\)。图像未经主波束响应校正。H\(_2\)弧形特征[60]在第一列中绘制为白色弧线。覆盖更宽速度范围的较低角分辨率通道图见扩展数据图3、补充图2和补充视频2。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Elliptical fits to the ringed emission of the CO( \(J\) =3-2) channel maps. Top: Color-coded plots of elliptical fits (see Methods) to the observed CO emission. Rings are represented by the ellipses that best-fit their emission, and filled emission regions by shaded areas, with colors indicating the LOS velocity relative to VLA 4B of the channel map. Their centers are indicated by color dots (rings) and triangles (filled emission). The rings tend to group in sequences that we call “families”, with their centers well aligned, their velocity increasing (in absolute value) and their size decreasing with distance from the stars (indicated with black plus signs), and ending in a region of filled emission (the “head”). Separate plots for each family are shown in the right panels. Linear regression fits (plotted as black lines for families I to III) have been performed (for families IV to VI their origin is set at the position of VLA 4B). The [FeII] microjet [ 60 ] from VLA 4B is represented by a green segment. Black and white arcs represent the H 2 arc-like features [ 60 ] . Offsets are relative to the position of VLA 4B. Bottom: Plots of the mean radius and the LOS velocity of the rings, as a function of the projected distance of their centers to VLA 4B. Error bars represent the estimated uncertainties, adopted as the deviations with respect to the fitted value that cause the intensity of the fitted ring to decrease by 1 \(\times\) r.m.s of the channel map (see Methods). The plots illustrate the trends (except for the heads) for the radius to decrease and the velocity to increase with distance, with the different families clearly differentiated in the plots. The gray line in the left panel traces the suggested outer edge of the families, forming an angle of \(\sim\) \(44^{\circ}\) from the axis ( \(\sim\) \(22^{\circ}\) after deprojection by an inclination angle of \(25^{\circ}\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：CO(\(J\)=3-2)通道图环状发射的椭圆拟合。顶部：对观测到的CO发射的椭圆拟合（见方法）的彩色编码图。环由其发射的最佳拟合椭圆表示，填充的发射区域由阴影区域表示，颜色表示通道图相对于VLA 4B的视向速度。它们的中心由彩色点（环）和三角形（填充发射）表示。环倾向于分组为称为“族”的序列，其中心良好对齐，速度（绝对值）随距恒星的距离增加而增加，尺寸减小，并终止于填充发射区域（“头部”）。每个族的单独图显示在右侧面板中。已对族I至III进行了线性回归拟合（绘制为黑线）（对于族IV至VI，其原点设置在VLA 4B位置）。来自VLA 4B的[FeII]微喷流[60]由绿色线段表示。黑色和白色弧线代表H\(_2\)弧形特征[60]。偏移量相对于VLA 4B的位置。底部：环的平均半径和视向速度作为其中心到VLA 4B投影距离的函数图。误差棒表示估计的不确定性，采用相对于拟合值的偏差，该偏差导致拟合环的强度降低1\(\times\)通道图的均方根（见方法）。这些图说明了半径随距离减小和速度随距离增加的趋势（头部除外），不同族在图中清晰区分。左图中的灰色线描绘了族的外边缘，与轴形成约\(44^{\circ}\)的角度（去投影后，倾角为\(25^{\circ}\)，约为\(22^{\circ}\)）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Decomposition of an approaching bowshock into velocity channel images. The \(x^{\prime}y^{\prime}\) plane is the plane of the sky, the \(z^{\prime}\) axis is the LOS, and the \(z\) axis is the symmetry axis of the bowshock, oriented at an inclination angle \(i\) with respect to the LOS. Left: Side view illustrating the velocity gradient of the blueshifted bowshock, where the magnitude of the velocities increases as we approach the bowshock head. Black arrows represent the velocity field of the bowshock shell, while colored arrows represent their projection onto the LOS. The points in the bowshock with LOS velocities \(v_{ch1}\) , \(v_{ch2}\) , and \(v_{ch3}\) are also shown in colors. Right: Projection onto the plane of the sky of the points in the bowshock with LOS velocities \(v_{ch1}\) , \(v_{ch2}\) , and \(v_{ch3}\) . Each colored curve corresponds to the emission observed in a channel map. Note that the LOS velocities ( \(v_{ch}\) ) are defined as positive when the motion is away from the observer (redshifted), but in the coordinate system used, positive \(v_{z^{\prime}}\) velocities are directed toward the observer (blueshifted); therefore, \(v_{ch}=-v_{z^{\prime}}\) .

title: Clustering with Light (but Massive) Relics
summary: We consider the effect of Light (but Massive) Relics (LiMRs) on the clustering of matter in the early Universe. We account for the fact that LiMRs which are massive enough may cluster on large length scales at early times, and may thus impact weak lensing of the cosmic microwave background (CMB) even on small angular scales. In particular, we find that LiMRs in the $\gtrsim$ eV mass range (and even $> 10$ eV), can constitute a non-negligible component of dark matter. This opens up a class of scenarios in which energy is injected as dark radiation, but begins to redshift as matter before recombination, thus avoiding constraints on $ΔN_{eff}$ while providing an eV-range dark matter component.
